name: Ghost Town
hints: More town. A telegraph office and a hotel are here.
GO TELE to enter the telegraph office. GO HOTE to enter the hotel.
The telegraph office has a key and a safe. The hotel has rooms to sleep in.
E=town with saloon/store (2), W=town with stable (4).
notes: Ghost town with telegraph office (room 24) and hotel (room 28). E=town (2), W=town (4).
